description_long: This is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped rock with a rugged, angular form and a coarse, grainy surface. The coloration is predominantly a mix of dark gray and lighter gray, with scattered white mineral inclusions and subtle brownish patches, suggesting a composition of granite or similar igneous rock. The surface is uneven, with visible pits, crevices, and rough edges, giving it a natural, unpolished appearance. The rock appears solid and dense, with no visible cavities or signs of artificial modification. Its size and mass would make it a significant obstacle if placed in an urban environment, such as a park or roadside. The overall texture and coloration indicate it could blend naturally into landscaped or undeveloped urban areas.
description: A rugged, dark gray rock with white mineral flecks and a coarse, angular surface. Its natural, unpolished appearance suggests durability and heaviness.
description_view_0: This view shows a broad, roughly triangular face with a mix of light and dark gray tones and visible white speckles.
description_view_1: The rock appears darker and more weathered, with brownish patches and deeper surface crevices visible on this side.
description_view_2: A more compact, rounded face is visible, with a smoother texture and fewer white inclusions compared to other views.
description_view_3: This side highlights the elongated profile of the rock, with a dense concentration of white mineral flecks and a relatively flat surface.
attribute_location: urban park landscaping or roadside barrier
